title: Quick Search returns results for MAD → BCN
description: Logs in, performs a quick-search for a MAD to BCN route with a future outbound date, and verifies results render for that route.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field
Click the "Iniciar sesión" button
Navigate to /quick-search and wait until input[name="origin_iata"] and input[name="destination_iata"] are visible
Type "mad" into input[name="origin_iata"], wait for #origin-suggestions to be visible, and click the first visible button inside #origin-suggestions
Type "bcn" into input[name="destination_iata"], wait for #destination-suggestions to be visible, and click the first visible button inside #destination-suggestions
Open the outbound date picker, choose the first enabled future date, and ensure the selected date is reflected in the date trigger
Click button[type="submit"] only after both route inputs contain 3-letter IATA codes
Verify .qs-results-list is visible and at least one .qs-result-row exists, and that a visible .qs-result-route contains 'MAD' and 'BCN'
